PUZZLE CHAPTER

How to play

Push every crate onto a golden paw pad.

Use the arrow controls to move Ginger. He can push one crate at a time. Do not push a crate into a corner unless a paw pad is there. Reset whenever you need another attempt.

LEVEL 1-2 · PUZZLE

Find the Mouse

Guide Ginger to the golden mouse.
